milestones.title: M1: Shared Foundations
milestones.description: Establish billing infrastructure, test tooling, typed DB helpers, universal auth gate mechanics, and billing-ready app registry schema — everything M2–M7 depends on.

milestones.title: M2: Universal Auth Gate
milestones.description: Every app requires login. Mechanical rollout leveraging M1's middleware changes to gate all 13 currently-public apps.

milestones.title: M3: Theme Token Audit
milestones.description: Every app uses shared design tokens consistently. No hardcoded hex, shadows, font stacks. Prerequisite for component migration in M4–M6.

milestones.title: M4: App Batch 1 — Most Complete
milestones.description: Migrate 8 mature, actively-used apps to @repo/ui components and add app-specific test coverage.

milestones.title: M5: App Batch 2 — Mid-Tier
milestones.description: Migrate 10 feature-complete, simpler apps to @repo/ui. Mostly single-page with static or lightly dynamic data.

milestones.title: M6: App Batch 3 — Stubs, Showcase & CC Sub-Modules
milestones.description: Build out stub apps, migrate showcase apps with lighter touch to preserve personality, and cover Command Center's 21 sub-modules.

milestones.title: M7: Deep Test Coverage
milestones.description: Harden the test suite with integration tests, edge cases, and E2E for critical flows. Capstone milestone depending on M1–M6.

issues.title: Extend app registry with billing metadata
issues.body:
## Summary
Add `tier` and `features` fields to `AppConfig` in `apps/web/lib/app-registry.ts` to support future billing integration. Schema-only change — no runtime enforcement.

## Details
- Add `tier: "free" | "pro" | "enterprise"` to `AppConfig` interface
- Add `features: Record<string, "free" | "pro" | "enterprise">` field
- Update all 27+ registry entries with default `tier: "free"` and `features: {}`
- Update existing registry tests to validate new fields

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `AppConfig` interface includes `tier` and `features` fields
- [ ] Every app entry in the registry has `tier: "free"` and `features: {}`
- [ ] Tests verify every app has a valid tier value
- [ ] Tests verify every app has a features object
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Auth gate: Age of Apes
issues.body:
## Summary
Add authentication gate to the Age of Apes app so it requires login.

## Details
- Update `apps/web/app/apps/age-of-apes/layout.tsx` to call `requireAppLayoutAccess("age-of-apes")`
- Update app registry entry: set `auth: true`
- Add smoke tests for auth behavior

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `layout.tsx` calls `requireAppLayoutAccess("age-of-apes")`
- [ ] App registry entry has `auth: true`
- [ ] Test: unauthenticated request redirects to `/login`
- [ ] Test: authenticated user without permission redirects to `/unauthorized`
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Replace hardcoded tokens — batch 1 (internal apps)
issues.body:
## Summary
Replace all hardcoded color values, shadows, and font stacks with Tailwind theme token classes in internal apps.

## Apps
Command Center, Accounts, Standup, Sprint Planning, Summaries, Daily Updates, Sentiment, Meeting Summaries, Uptime, Sales

## Details
- Replace inline hex/rgb/oklch color values with theme token classes (e.g., `text-accent`, `bg-navy-950`, `text-muted-foreground`)
- Replace hardcoded shadows with `shadow-glass`, `shadow-glass-sm`, `shadow-glow` tokens
- Replace hardcoded border-radius with `rounded-glass` or theme radius values
- Replace hardcoded font-family with `font-sans`, `font-mono`, `font-heading`
- Add snapshot/visual regression baseline per app

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No hardcoded hex/rgb/oklch color values remain in any of the 10 apps
- [ ] No hardcoded shadow values remain
- [ ] No hardcoded font-family declarations remain
- [ ] All apps render correctly with theme tokens
- [ ] Visual regression baselines captured for each app
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Add theme token lint rule
issues.body:
## Summary
Create an ESLint rule that warns on hardcoded color values in TSX files to prevent regression after token migration.

## Details
- ESLint rule warning on hardcoded hex (#xxx, #xxxxxx), rgb(), oklch() values in TSX files
- Integrate rule into `@repo/config` shared ESLint config
- Allow escape hatch via eslint-disable comment for intentional overrides
- Rule should catch: inline style color values, className strings with hardcoded colors

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] ESLint rule created and integrated into `@repo/config`
- [ ] Rule warns on hardcoded hex values in TSX files
- [ ] Rule warns on hardcoded rgb()/oklch() values in TSX files
- [ ] Rule does NOT warn on theme token classes
- [ ] Rule can be disabled per-line with eslint-disable
- [ ] `pnpm lint` runs cleanly across all apps (existing violations addressed or suppressed)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Extend @repo/ui with missing common components
issues.body:
## Summary
Audit component gaps needed for M4–M6 app migrations and build missing shared components in `@repo/ui`.

## Details
- Audit all 27 apps for commonly-used UI patterns not yet in `@repo/ui`
- Likely needed: `Table`, `DataGrid`, `StatusBadge`, `LoadingSkeleton`, `ErrorBoundary`, `EmptyState` variants
- Follow existing patterns: forwardRef, CVA (class-variance-authority), cn() utility
- Each component should support theme tokens and dark mode
- Add Storybook-style examples or tests for variant coverage

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Audit complete — documented list of needed components
- [ ] `Table` component with sortable columns and row selection
- [ ] `DataGrid` component for tabular data display
- [ ] `StatusBadge` component with semantic color variants
- [ ] `LoadingSkeleton` component with configurable shapes
- [ ] `ErrorBoundary` wrapper component
- [ ] `EmptyState` component with icon, title, description, action slots
- [ ] All components use forwardRef, CVA, cn() patterns
- [ ] All components render with theme tokens
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Command Center: component migration
issues.body:
## Summary
Migrate Command Center hub page and shared module chrome to `@repo/ui` components. Sub-module internals are deferred to M6.

## Details
- Replace inline buttons, cards, badges, inputs, navigation with `@repo/ui` equivalents
- Migrate dashboard grid layout and module navigation sidebar
- Preserve all existing functionality
- Leave unique components but ensure they use theme tokens
- This is the largest migration surface in the codebase

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Hub page uses `@repo/ui` Card, Button, Badge components
- [ ] Sidebar navigation uses `@repo/ui` navigation components
- [ ] Module chrome (headers, breadcrumbs, layout) uses shared components
- [ ] No inline Tailwind button/card/badge patterns remain in hub/chrome code
- [ ] All existing functionality preserved
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] Visual appearance matches or improves current design

issues.title: Auth flow E2E tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add Playwright E2E tests covering the complete authentication flow.

## Details
- Login → permission check → redirect → access grant
- Cover: successful login, unauthorized redirect, self-enroll, permission hierarchy, cross-subdomain cookies

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: successful login redirects to requested app
- [ ] Test: unauthorized user redirects to /unauthorized
- [ ] Test: self-enroll grants view permission on first login
- [ ] Test: permission hierarchy (admin can access edit-required pages)
- [ ] Test: cross-subdomain cookies persist session
- [ ] Test: expired session redirects to login
- [ ] All tests pass in CI
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Billing flow integration tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add integration tests for Stripe billing flows.

## Details
- Stripe webhook handling for all relevant event types
- Subscription lifecycle: create, update, cancel, trial
- `hasFeatureAccess()` with various subscription states
- Mock Stripe API responses

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: webhook handles customer.subscription.created
- [ ] Test: webhook handles customer.subscription.updated
- [ ] Test: webhook handles customer.subscription.deleted
- [ ] Test: subscription create → active → cancel lifecycle
- [ ] Test: hasFeatureAccess returns true for active pro user accessing pro feature
- [ ] Test: hasFeatureAccess returns false for free user accessing pro feature
- [ ] Test: hasFeatureAccess returns true for trialing subscription
- [ ] Test: hasFeatureAccess returns false for past_due subscription
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Proxy/routing integration tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add integration tests for subdomain routing and proxy behavior.

## Details
- Subdomain resolution for all 27 apps
- Unknown subdomain → 404
- Localhost dev routing with `?app=` param
- `hrefWithinDeployedApp()` across environments
- Middleware chain: host → auth → rewrite

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: every registered subdomain resolves to correct route group
- [ ] Test: unknown subdomain returns 404 or redirect
- [ ] Test: localhost `?app=slug` override works in dev mode
- [ ] Test: `hrefWithinDeployedApp()` generates correct URLs for production
- [ ] Test: `hrefWithinDeployedApp()` generates correct URLs for localhost
- [ ] Test: middleware chain processes requests in correct order
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Shared package unit tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add comprehensive unit tests for all shared packages.

## Details
- `@repo/auth`: permission hierarchy, session handling, multi-tenant client factory
- `@repo/db`: query helpers, typed responses
- `@repo/ui`: render every component with all variant combinations
- `@repo/billing`: customer/subscription helpers (beyond existing tests)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `@repo/auth`: test permission hierarchy for all level combinations
- [ ] `@repo/auth`: test session handling edge cases
- [ ] `@repo/db`: test all query helpers with mock responses
- [ ] `@repo/db`: test error handling for failed queries
- [ ] `@repo/ui`: render test for every exported component
- [ ] `@repo/ui`: variant coverage for components with CVA variants
- [ ] `@repo/billing`: test edge cases not covered by M1 tests
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes across all packages

issues.title: App registry integrity tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add tests ensuring the app registry is consistent with the actual codebase.

## Details
- No duplicate slugs or subdomains in registry
- Every `routeGroup` maps to an existing directory
- Every auth-gated app has a layout calling `requireAppLayoutAccess()`
- Every app has a valid `tier` field

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: no duplicate slugs in registry
- [ ] Test: no duplicate subdomains in registry
- [ ] Test: every routeGroup corresponds to an existing directory under `apps/web/app/`
- [ ] Test: every app with `auth: true` has `requireAppLayoutAccess()` in its layout
- [ ] Test: every app has a valid tier value (free, pro, or enterprise)
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: Error boundary and edge case tests
issues.body:
## Summary
Add tests for error boundaries, edge cases, and graceful degradation.

## Details
- Unauthenticated API calls
- Expired sessions mid-navigation
- Supabase query failures
- Malformed webhook payloads
- Missing env vars at startup
- Verify graceful degradation and user-facing error messages

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test: unauthenticated API call returns 401
- [ ] Test: expired session redirects to login
- [ ] Test: Supabase query failure triggers error boundary
- [ ] Test: malformed webhook payload returns 400, not 500
- [ ] Test: missing SUPABASE_URL throws descriptive error
- [ ] Test: error boundary renders user-friendly message
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes

issues.title: CI pipeline setup
issues.body:
## Summary
Set up GitHub Actions CI pipeline for automated testing on PRs and merges.

## Details
- GitHub Actions workflow running `pnpm test` on every PR
- Playwright E2E tests on merge to main
- Coverage reports with threshold enforcement
- Integrates with Alpha Loop's `test_command`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow file created at `.github/workflows/ci.yml`
- [ ] `pnpm test` runs on every PR and blocks merge on failure
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` runs on every PR
- [ ] `pnpm lint` runs on every PR
- [ ] Playwright E2E tests run on merge to main
- [ ] Coverage reports generated and posted to PR
- [ ] Coverage threshold set (e.g., 70% for new code)
- [ ] Pipeline compatible with Alpha Loop's `test_command: pnpm test`
- [ ] All checks pass on current main branch
